title: pimelea alpina
intro: Pimelea alpina, also known as mountain rice flower, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pimelea alpina include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and acting as an antiseptic. In herbal preparations, Pimelea alpina can be made into a tea, tincture, or infused oil, although its use should be under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional due to potential toxicity.
